function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd
alias: house_mesh_juniper_ssd
purchased_on: 2026-02-07
total_eur: 105
counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---
# Juniper storage refresh

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd |
| alias          | house_mesh_juniper_ssd      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-02-07                  |
| total_eur      | 105                         |
| counterparty   | Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH   |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Juniper                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 2 TB SATA SSD     | 1   | 89       | 89       |
| 2 | USB clone adapter | 1   | 16       | 16       |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL             |     |          | 105      |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring all Juniper-related bills. I resolved Juniper via the canonical entity record, found one related bill, added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving the original body verbatim, and then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, used canonical entity resolution before finance lookup, applied finance schema fields only, preserved existing body under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in /00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Canonical entity file /10_entities/cast/juniper.md provided identifier 'juniper'. Search and file inspection showed one matching bill: /50_finance/purchases/2026_02_07__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md. The note contained complete visible bill/line-item data required by /99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so frontmatter was added accordingly with original body preserved per migration workflow. After completion, inbox item was deleted per /99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
